title: jatropha pohliana
intro: Jatropha pohliana is a plant species in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae), native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Jatropha pohliana include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Jatropha pohliana can be made into a decoction, infusion, or paste, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
